strongest_claim_proved: The exact Lean carrier KTGlyph.Glyph has cardinality 42.
stronger_claim_open: Concrete PSL(2,7) invariance; physical exhaustiveness of the 42 glyphs.
notes: The count is relative to the framed Fano law encoded in OperationNormalForm.

strongest_claim_proved: The exact Lean carrier KTMonad.Monad has cardinality 168.
stronger_claim_open: Concrete PSL(2,7) action; canonical identification of monads with group elements; physical interpretation of the four walk realizations.
notes: The theorem proves 42 glyphs times four walk states equals 168.

strongest_claim_proved: The explicitly specified routed quaternion-block multiplication equals the independently defined Cayley-Dickson product for all inputs.
stronger_claim_open: Independent Pascal-mod-3 forcing; uniqueness of the routing datum; doubled norm composition; alternativity; explicit nonzero associator witness.
notes: The current selector, route, and orientation datum was target-informed.

strongest_claim_proved: The doubled quaternion carrier has scalar dimension 8 and reaches the explicitly defined maximal Hurwitz dimension.
stronger_claim_open: Full Hurwitz classification; norm composition on the doubled carrier; failure of composition beyond dimension 8.
notes: This is a dimension theorem about a constructed carrier, not the full classification theorem.

strongest_claim_proved: One explicit deterministic complete-state system has a noninjective local projection and residue-sensitive evolution, hence quasi-stochastic visible dynamics.
stronger_claim_open: Canonicality of the witness transition; concrete frame invariance; Born rule; empirical quantum statistics.
notes: The result is an existence theorem, not a universal claim about all KT dynamics.

strongest_claim_proved: Any invariant scalar projection is constant on the orbits of the supplied lawful frame action.
stronger_claim_open: Construction of the concrete PSL(2,7) action; proof that all claimed physical scalar observables are invariant.
notes: This is the cleanest theorem in the current axiom-audit sample.

strongest_claim_proved: Any physically admissible invariant observable descends to a well-defined function on the monad orbit quotient.
stronger_claim_open: Concrete PSL(2,7) action; proof that the quotient is the physically correct state space; audit of all existing monad observables.
notes: The theorem formalizes the no-preferred-trivialization principle.

strongest_claim_proved: All Steiner blocks generated from distinct Fano point pairs recover exactly the seven explicit Fano lines.
stronger_claim_open: Independent proof that Pascal routing uniquely forces the Fano completion table.
notes: This proves equality with the explicit Fano incidence structure, not uniqueness from Pascal routing.

strongest_claim_proved: The two Yang-Baxter braid paths recover the same exterior Fano incidence block.
stronger_claim_open: A nontrivial routed multiplication theorem in which braid coherence forces the full Cayley-Dickson selector datum.
notes: The result concerns recovered incidence rather than equality of complete routed states.

strongest_claim_proved: Two distinct routed states can share the same visible block payload and control value while retaining distinct routing addresses.
stronger_claim_open: Canonical physical interpretation of the retained route address and invariance under the concrete substrate frame group.
notes: This is a concrete witness that projection can erase visible distinctions while preserving structured provenance.

strongest_claim_proved: Fano recovery depends on visible payload incidence and does not distinguish the retained routing residue.
stronger_claim_open: A theorem that the ignored route residue is precisely the physically relevant hidden memory variable.
notes: The theorem formally separates recovered incidence from route provenance.

strongest_claim_proved: Every lawful framed operation has a unique admissible coordinate triple consisting of Fano address triadic role and orientation.
stronger_claim_open: Proof that every physically admissible KT-local process satisfies the framed Fano law used in the classification.
notes: This is the semantic classification theorem underlying the 42-operation count.

strongest_claim_proved: A primitive double-cover recurrence falls into the unit-half prime-two case or the nonunit-half factorization case.
stronger_claim_open: A complete classification of all spinorial recurrence systems or a physical derivation of observed prime spectra.
notes: The theorem exposes the arithmetic boundary created by the half-period structure.

strongest_claim_proved: Primitive recurrence alone does not imply arithmetic primality.
stronger_claim_open: Identification of the additional physically forced condition that rules out nontrivial block decomposition.
notes: This theorem prevents the project from equating recurrence primitiveness with number-theoretic primality.

strongest_claim_proved: A period of at least two that is both a primitive return and spinorially indecomposable is arithmetically prime.
stronger_claim_open: Proof that physical spinor dynamics necessarily supplies the indecomposability premise for all relevant modes.
notes: The theorem explicitly repairs the insufficiency identified in PrimitiveRecurrence.

strongest_claim_proved: Applying finite-depth recovery to the kth state of a reversible history returns the initial state exactly.
stronger_claim_open: Instantiation for the full concrete KT substrate and proof that physically available escrow contains the required recovery data.
notes: This theorem is kernel-clean and expresses exact finite-depth memory escrow.

strongest_claim_proved: Recovering k times after advancing k times returns the original complete state.
stronger_claim_open: Concrete substrate instantiation and identification of which projected records retain sufficient recovery information.
notes: This is an axiom-free iterated inverse theorem.

strongest_claim_proved: The routed token encoding is bijective between complete routed states and token states.
stronger_claim_open: Proof that this encoding is the unique or physically forced Planck tokenization map and is invariant under the concrete substrate symmetry.
notes: This establishes reversible formal tokenization for the defined routed representation.

strongest_claim_proved: The complete initial routed state is exactly recoverable from the corresponding token history.
stronger_claim_open: Physical identification of token history with observable or escrow-accessible Planck-scale memory.
notes: This is the strongest current tokenized finite-history recovery theorem.

strongest_claim_proved: Equality of complete token states implies equality of the corresponding complete routed states.
stronger_claim_open: Physical uniqueness and frame invariance of the concrete token representation.
notes: No complete-state distinction is lost by the defined token encoding.
